description: Automated deterministic scoring rubric for Pluto MVP-alpha fake-adapter workflow quality.

dimensions.description: The persisted run event log shows an ordered workflow from orchestration start through lead start, worker activity, lead summary, artifact creation, and terminal completion.
dimensions.pass_criteria: Events contain run_started before lead_started, at least one worker_requested/worker_started/worker_completed chain before lead_message, artifact_created after lead_message, and run_completed as the terminal event.
dimensions.fail_criteria: Any required stage is missing, out of order, or the terminal event is run_failed or absent.

dimensions.description: The team lead and all MVP worker roles are represented in events and the final artifact.
dimensions.pass_criteria: lead, planner, generator, and evaluator all appear via events and/or contributions, and the artifact markdown references all four role names.
dimensions.fail_criteria: Any required role is absent from the observable workflow or omitted from the final artifact.

dimensions.description: The artifact is suitable for an operator and does not leak internal adapter prompt protocol fragments.
dimensions.pass_criteria: Neither artifact markdown nor worker contribution output contains 'Instructions from the Team Lead:' or 'Reply with your contribution only'.
dimensions.fail_criteria: Any forbidden protocol fragment appears in the final artifact or worker contribution output.

dimensions.description: The workflow includes enough completed worker outputs to satisfy MVP-alpha team convergence expectations.
dimensions.pass_criteria: At least two worker_completed events exist and at least two worker contributions are included in the final artifact object.
dimensions.fail_criteria: Fewer than two workers complete or fewer than two contributions are present in the final artifact.

dimensions.description: The fake-adapter golden run produces an evidence packet that is present, schema-valid, and free of secret-shaped content.
dimensions.pass_criteria: evidence.md and evidence.json exist for the run, evidence.json validates as EvidencePacketV0, and neither evidence file contains JWT-like, API-key, GitHub-token, or other secret-shaped strings.
dimensions.fail_criteria: Evidence is missing, malformed, fails the EvidencePacketV0 schema, or contains secret-shaped content.
